instruction: Find the latest open pull request in "openclaw/openclaw" with label "size: XS", and save it as "#<number> | <labels> | <title>" to "$HOME/Desktop/gh_open_prs_3_1.txt". If no matching pull request is found, save an empty file.
reference_command: gh pr list --repo openclaw/openclaw --search 'label:"size: XS" sort:created-desc' --limit 1 --json number,title,labels --jq '.[] | "#\(.number) | \(([.labels[].name] | if length == 0 then "none" else join(",") end)) | \(.title)"' > "$HOME/Desktop/gh_open_prs_3_1.txt"

parameters.expected_command: gh pr list --repo openclaw/openclaw --search 'label:"size: XS" sort:created-desc' --limit 1 --json number,title,labels --jq '.[] | "#\(.number) | \(([.labels[].name] | if length == 0 then "none" else join(",") end)) | \(.title)"'
